name: Jeff Ballard
abstract: Jeff Ballard is an American jazz drummer. He has played with Ray Charles and Pat Metheny and played periodically with Chick Corea in many groups such as Origin and the Chick Corea New Trio.

concerts.label: Karrin Allyson and Luciana Souza, Singers
Pat Metheny, Guitar, and Brad Mehldau, Piano
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Brad Mehldau Trio

about_quotes.speaker: Chick Corea
about_quotes.evidence: You start the “new trio,” I think you called it, with Avishai Cohen and Jeff Ballard.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chick Corea — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Palmer
about_quotes.evidence: Jeff Ballard is able to do it... I don't think I could have put together the dates that I have... I don't think I could have done it by myself.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Palmer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 2, 2025
